commands.review_summary:
The PR adds message-processing and skill-execution diagnostic events, emits them around embedded-run stages, maps them to diagnostics-otel spans/metrics, adds observability docs, and carries several test/script/package adjustments.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows the high-cardinality attrs are passed directly to metric record calls, and the skill attrs type mismatch remains in the final diff. For the feature itself, reproduction is not a bug-style path; the missing proof is a live OTLP/Jaeger or Prometheus run.
commands.review_followup: This needs maintainer/product review plus contributor-supplied real OTLP proof; automation cannot supply the author's required real behavior proof for this external PR.
